arts.ttl: Player living in ‘hell’ at West Ham United – Form has ‘plummeted’, not helping Hammers form
arts.sum: Lucas Paqueta is living a ‘hell’ at West Ham United, with the team’s bad performances, his own poor form and the lingering case against him put forward by the FA all contributing to his misery. That’s according to Rafael Reis’ blog for UOL, which details Paqueta’s ‘hell’ at West Ham at this moment in time.
